3365 // Token: 0x06004157 RID: 16727 RVA: 0x006A7778 File Offset: 0x006A5978
3366 public static SettingsForCharacterPreview SimpleLoop(int startFrame, int frameCount, int delayPerFrame = 4, bool bounceLoop = false)
3367 {
3368 if (frameCount < 1)
3369 {
3370 frameCount = 1;
3371 }
3372 SettingsForCharacterPreview settingsForCharacterPreview = new SettingsForCharacterPreview();
3373 settingsForCharacterPreview.Offset = Vector2.Zero;
3374 settingsForCharacterPreview.SpriteDirection = 1;
3375 settingsForCharacterPreview.WhenSelected(new int?(startFrame), new int?(frameCount), new int?(delayPerFrame), new bool?(bounceLoop));
3376 settingsForCharacterPreview.WhenNotSelected(new int?(startFrame), new int?(frameCount), new int?(delayPerFrame), new bool?(bounceLoop));
3377 return settingsForCharacterPreview;
3378 }
